name: Castle of Secrets
short_description: Castle of Secrets is a dark psychological adventure with horror elements. Uncover the mystery behind your family's murder as you journey through the world of the dead, meet strange beings, solve puzzles, and make choices that shape the story.
detailed_description:
The ancient Tranton family curse has forced young Miss Susan to embark on a perilous journey—one that will take her deep into the realm of the dead. Along the way, she will encounter ghostly inhabitants, forge unexpected alliances, face formidable enemies, and, most importantly, uncover the answer to the most haunting question of all: Who is truly responsible for the massacre of her entire family?

One day, in the grand halls of the Tranton family castle, a loving couple welcomed a daughter into the world—her name was Miss Susan.

Her father, Mr. Grinn was a man of remarkable charm and influence, deeply adored by his wife and daughter. But tragedy struck when he met a mysterious and untimely death.

Grief consumed Susan’s mother, Miss Agatha, who found herself lost in sorrow, wandering the castle like a shadow, unable to bear the weight of her loss. Those around her, hoping to bring her solace, arranged for her to remarry. Her new husband, Mr. Austin was a rich and intelligent gentleman. This union brought a small sense of order back into the family.

Yet this fragile peace was nothing more than an illusion.

Like a black cat prowling in the night, misfortune slinked through the halls, leaving whispers of curses and sins in its wake…

Castle of Secrets is a story-line based psychological mystery adventure game, immersing players in a hauntingly beautiful atmospheric 3D environment with intricately hand-drawn 2D characters. 

The game cleverly weaves puzzle-solving into the narrative, offering a range of challenges that will test your intelligence and logical thinking. Every puzzle is more than just an obstacle; it is a crucial piece of the mystery, with solutions that directly impact the course of the story.

3D Point-and-Click Exploration – Freedom and interaction are at the heart of the experience. Examine, collect, and manipulate objects, and explore every hidden corner of the castle utilizing a unique interactive scene camera. 

Every item you collect may hold the key to a deeper truth – pay close attention, analyze, and combine objects to progress in your quest to uncover the sinister secrets buried within these ancient walls.

Meet 30+ Unpredictable Characters – Every encounter matters. Some residents may help you, others may deceive you, and all of them have their own agendas.

Branching Narrative with Multiple Endings–Your choices shape Miss Susan’s fate.How far will you go to uncover the truth?

Beautiful Hand-Drawn Original Art – Experience a uniquely crafted world where every detail is an original piece of art. From meticulously designed 3D environments to stunning hand-drawn 2D characters, every scene is brought to life with an evocative, atmospheric style that enhances the mystery and immersion of the game.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, French, Italian, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Turkish, Ukrainian, Japanese, Spanish - Spain, German, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
